external.description: Pike River, directed by Robert Sarkies and written by Fiona Samuel, is a compelling drama based on the 2010 mining disaster on New Zealand's South Island. The film centres on two mothers, portrayed by Melanie Lynskey and Robyn Malcolm, who refuse to accept the official closure of the mine that killed their family members. The story follows their emotional journey as they confront legal, governmental, and societal pressures while advocating for transparency and accountability. Set against the windswept backdrop of Greymouth, the cinematography by Gin Loane captures the South Island’s stark, moody landscapes, heightening the tension and sense of threat these women face. Lynskey and Malcolm deliver outstanding performances, their combined presence described as comparable to two Meryl Streeps on screen. The film also features Lucy Lawless and a cameo by Jacinda Ardern, adding depth and authenticity. Editor Peter Roberts uses lingering shots to intensify the drama, while the script smartly navigates complex town hall meetings and legal battles. Ultimately, Pike River highlights resilience, grief, and the fight for justice, leaving viewers with a bittersweet sense of hope amid tragedy.

Earlier this year, Hadreas performed alongside his longtime collaborator and co-writer Alan Wyffels, and the duo will continue their intimate performances across several cities. In North America, they are scheduled to play six shows in September and October, including stops in Vancouver, Seattle, Portland, Petaluma, Big Sur, and Los Angeles. The tour will conclude with a one-off London show at the Union Chapel on 28 October. Hadreas reflected on the tour, emphasising the closeness of the collaboration with Wyffels, who was the first person he ever sang in front of. He expressed excitement about revisiting older songs in a stripped-back format while also presenting new material as a duo. Perfume Genius released his previous album, ‘Glory’, last year, which he described as reflecting his personal anxieties and growth as a performer. Outside of his tour activities, Hadreas has been involved in projects such as collaborating on a cover of Bonnie 'Prince' Billy’s ‘I See A Darkness’ with Anna Calvi and encouraging fans to update his Wikipedia photos, which had not been changed since 2017.

record.text: Mit einem Teaser gab das Produktiosstudio Kyoto Animation bekannt, dass der Manga »The Credits Roll Into the Sea (Umi ga Hashiru Endroll)« von John Tarachine einen Anime-Film erhält. Dieser soll im laufe des nächsten Jahres 2027 in den japanischen Kinos erscheinen.

images.alt:
Die Reihe lief von Oktober 2020 bis  im Magazine »Mystery Bonita« von Akita Shoten und umfasst insgesamt 9 Bände. Der 9 Band ist heute in Japan erschienen. Dark Horse veröffentlicht den Manga auf Englisch, der erste Band erscheint am 7. Juli 2026.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Nach dem Tod ihres Mannes lebt die 65-jährige Umiko in einer Stille, die kaum noch Platz für Neues lässt. Erst ein Kinobesuch nach vielen Jahren bringt etwas in ihr zum Klingen. Dort begegnet sie dem Filmstudenten Kai, der bemerkt, wie aufmerksam sie nicht nur den Film, sondern auch die Reaktionen des Publikums beobachtet. Als er sie fragt, ob sie selbst Filme machen möchte, wird Umiko klar, dass in ihr ein Wunsch geschlummert hat, dem sie nie nachgegangen ist.

images.alt: You hear wild stuff all the time now. Like this story that Nat Friedman, a former CEO of GitHub, told recently at a conference. Friedman uses OpenClaw, an autonomous AI agent that runs on his computer, acting like a personal assistant. One day, his OpenClaw decided that he wasn’t drinking enough water, so Friedman instructed the agent to “do whatever it takes” to make sure he stays hydrated. According to Friedman, eventually the bot directed him to go to the kitchen and drink a bottle of water. It informed him that it was monitoring him via a connected camera in his home. “I’m going to watch to make sure you do it,” the bot supposedly said. Friedman did as he was told, and, moments later, the bot sent him a frame of him drinking the bottle of water and said good job. “I felt like I did do a good job,” Friedman said.

【美国观察：伊朗战争担忧引发全球债券大跌】
FT 报道，受伊朗战争引发通胀冲击的担忧影响，全球债券市场出现剧烈波动。美国 30 年期国债收益率本周收于 2007 年以来的最高水平。

分析：地缘政治冲突的升级往往伴随着能源价格上涨预期，这会直接推高通胀预期，从而迫使债券收益率上升，压低债价。对于投资者而言，需密切关注中东局势对美债收益率曲线的扰动，这可能引发全球资本流动与避险资产的需求变化。

后续看：伊朗局势是否会演变为更大规模的冲突，以及美联储在通胀预期抬升背景下的政策响应。

These are source identifiers

Source identifiers are used to track your activity on a site.Where you came from, what device you use, and even who you talk to. Whether it's written clearly in the url or tied to a random string of characters, it's assigned to your activity.

When you send a link containing a source identifier to somebody and they click it, it signals to the website that you two are connected. And that data goes right back to the website operators, and thus their advertisers.

Whenever you select "share" or "copy link" on a social app or website, it creates a link like this. If you give even the smallest shit about online privacy, it's important to remove them.
Everything after the "?" symbol can be removed without issue, especially sections starting with "si=" or "utm _source="

In this episode of The Low Code Revolution show, we… #PowerAutomate #AIAgents #LowCode

external.description:
What if AI agents could not only suggest Power Automate flows - but actually build, debug, optimize, and govern them for you?

In this episode of The Low Code Revolution show, we go beyond the boundaries of Copilot with real, end‑to‑end demos showing how AI agents interact directly with Power Automate using the Flow Studio MCP (Model Context Protocol) server created by John Liu and Catherine Han.

John and Catherine demonstrate how AI agents powered by Flow Studio MCP can securely access Power Platform environments, understand flow runs, apply enterprise standards and advanced patterns, fix errors, and even implement approval escalation - all using natural language.

✅ Learn more:
🔗 Flow Studio MCP - https://mcp.flowstudio.app
🔗 Flow Studio MCP Guides: Getting Started, Debug, Build, Tools, Copilot Skills - https://learn.flowstudio.app

 ✅ Chapter Markers:
00:00 - Introduction
01:20 - Background: why Flow Studio MCP server was built for Power Automate
02:54 - Challenges with APIs & flow visibility
06:47 - Demo 1: Listing environments and existing flows
08:42 - Demo 2: Building and testing a complex approval flow
20:22 - Demo 3: Enforcing naming conventions using enterprise standards
23:56 - Demo 4: Approval escalation and timeout patterns
27:25 - Demo 5: Debugging failed flows and proactive error handling
30:34 - Future vision: Copilot Studio + multi‑agent scenarios
31:42 - Where to get Flow Studio MCP
35:27 - Wrap‑up

✅ Resources:
Flow Studio - https://flowstudio.app
Blog - https://johnliu.net/
John Liu LinkedIn - https://www.linkedin.com/in/johnnliu/

I joined Chemical Bank in 1983 to help finalize Pronto Home Banking. Chemical Bank bought Manufacturers Hannover, then Chase and kept the Chase name in case you wondered.

images.alt:
Chemical Bank is experimenting
with automatic banking ma-
chines at several of its branches
(Penn Station, 60th Street and
Lexington Ave., Lefrak City,
Rockville Centre, and Benson-
hurst) which allow the user to
withdraw money automatically
at any time of the day or night.
The needy one inserts a spe-
cially coded credit card and
punches a 6-digit identification
number onto a keyboard to
confirm he's the real account
holder. If the number checks
out the machine and its com-
puter issue the cash (either $25
or $50). If the card is invalid,
or if the wrong number is
punched (you get three tries),
the machine holds the card.

Powershell isn't a programming language, the good news is I don't have to hate in anymore. I give copilot the input, tell it what I need for output and as long as the data/input is standardized copilot converts via a .ps1 everytime.

If the data/input deviates from the standard, it falls apart.
